title: Trump Extends Cease-Fire, Even as Peace Talks Are Put on Hold
summary_full: With the cease-fire on the verge of ending, President Trump said on Tuesday that he would keep it in place until Iran’s “proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other.”
summary_public: With the cease-fire on the verge of ending, President Trump said on Tuesday that he would keep it in place until Iran’s “proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other.”

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: discussions are concluded, one way or the other.
